metadata.description: Structured 12-phase guide for open-source contribution in Claude Code: discover, analyze, work, test, submit, review, debug, pr-review, triage, sync, release, cleanup.

plugins.name: contribute
plugins.description: Structured guide for open-source contribution: discover issues, analyze repos, write code, test with 85% quality gate, submit PRs, debug CI failures, and respond to review feedback. 12 phases, 3 operating modes, 6 safety rules.
